semanticCore: Middle-aged, mature man, strength, support, or grey-haired
primaryMeaning: Middle-aged (between youth and old age, typically 30 to 50 years)
quranicRelevance: Jesus speaking to people in middle age/maturity (Kahlan - 'fil-mahdi wa-kahlan').

keyDerivations.meaning: Middle-aged man, mature adult, or one whose youth is completed

figurativeOrRareUsages: تُكَلِّمُ النَّاسَ فِي الْمَهْدِ وَكَهْلًا (5:110): You spoke to people in the cradle and in maturity/middle age (prophetic communication at both extremes of life).
summaryEn: The root refers to middle-aged maturity (Kuhl), highlighting the miracle of Jesus speaking with equal wisdom as a baby in the cradle and as a mature man (Kahlan).
summaryAr: يشير هذا الجذر إلى سن الاكتمال والوقار بين الشباب والشيخوخة (كهل)، واصفاً إعجاز كلام عيسى في المهد وكهلاً بنفس الفصاحة والحكمة.
rawText: اِكْتَهَلَ 8 , said of a plant, It became tall and full-grown: (TA:) or it became of its full height, and blossomed: (S:) see زَاخِرٌ. كَاهِلٌ [The withers of a horse, &c.] i. q. حَارِكٌ: or the anterior portion of the upper part of the back, next the neck, which is the upper third part, containing six vertebra: or the part between the two shoulder-blades: or the part where the neck is joined to the back how: [the base of the neck: see ثَبَجٌ]. (K.) كَاهِنٌ : see عَرَّافٌ and عَائِفٌ. كَهْلٌ Of middle age; or between that age and the period when his hair has become intermixed with heaviness. See شَبَابٌ; and شَيْخٌ and غُلَامٌ. كُهُولَةٌ : see شَبَابٌ. كِهَانَةٌ Divination: soothsaying. (K, &c.)
